issue.title: Review existing docs diagrams for clarity and accuracy
Critique diagram: bead-epic-work
issue.description: Inspect docs/images/bead-epic-work*.png (and prompt sidecar if present) for clarity (would a new user understand it?) and accuracy (does it reflect current code?). Read the embedding doc and the relevant code to ground the accuracy review. Write the critique to docs/images/bead-epic-work*.critique.md (use the actual full PNG basename). Do NOT modify the PNG, the prompt sidecar, or the embedding doc — that is the next phase's job.
